action.reasoning: Observation: Import error due to missing numpy. Prior eval reached 0.714 balanced accuracy. Analysis: Need to implement logit adjustment (subtract tau*log(prior) during training and inference), focal loss, mixup, and save logit bias for test-time correction. Decision: Rewrite train.py with all components, update predict.py to apply logit bias and enable TTA by default, then train 60 epochs and submit eval.
